acceptance.metric: 1. Grep proof for BODY post-chain CLI/env passthrough
acceptance.baseline: Wave-5 proof found only --no-sam3d-wrist-bone-lock; no passthrough for temporal/foot/contact/world smoothing stages.
acceptance.after: Added --body-postchain raw plus per-stage flags in process_video.py and remote_body_dispatch.py; threaded through RemoteConfig, dispatch config, and VM BodyStageRunner.
acceptance.target: Each post-chain stage reachable from process_video.py and remote_body_dispatch.py.

acceptance.baseline: Default HEAD deterministic BODY builder hash d55b0ffbd4e91390b2a36277940164ad20d5125ad1adf67ec2e4565f68e46aea.
acceptance.after: Current no-flag hash matches HEAD; raw fixture writes body_raw_grounded_joints.json, schema-valid, with loud bypass records and raw-vs-processed difference covered.
acceptance.target: Raw OFF run persists valid sidecar and bypass summary; no-flag default remains byte-identical on deterministic fixture.

acceptance.baseline: No tests existed for independent temporal/foot-lock/foot-pin/contact-splice/wrist/world-smoothing bypasses.
acceptance.after: Added focused tests for temporal_smoothing, foot_lock, foot_pin, wrist_lock, contact_splice, and world_joint_visual_smoothing bypass behavior.
acceptance.target: Each knob verifiably bypasses its implementation stage, not only config echo.

acceptance.baseline: New flags absent from direct CLI reference tests.
acceptance.after: list_scaffold_tools passed with missing_direct_cli_reference_tests=0 and missing_related_tests=0; direct help tests pass for process_video.py and remote_body_dispatch.py.
acceptance.target: Scaffold index/reference tests updated same-lane for new flags.

acceptance.after: MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/racketsport -q was interrupted after 35m34s with 3 failed, 1115 passed, 4 skipped.
acceptance.target: Full wide suite green, or every failure proven pre-existing at HEAD.

acceptance.baseline: No raw-persist BODY dispatch command existed.
acceptance.after: Recorded exact command shape and expected output paths in runs/lanes/w6_gate1b_knob_20260708/report.json; host placeholder is explicit because wave-6 boot says fleet was zero and IPs recycle.
acceptance.target: Report exact one-clip wolverine_mixed_0200 command and raw-persist output paths.

full_suite.failure_notes: Interrupted after 35m34s with failures in unowned/untracked calibration tests: tests/racketsport/test_calibrate_charuco_device.py::test_calibrate_charuco_device_recovers_synthetic_barrel_distortion_and_persists_profile, tests/racketsport/test_court_calibration_distortion.py::test_metric_calibration_undistorts_distorted_edge_keypoints_toward_truth, and tests/racketsport/test_court_calibration_distortion.py::test_metric_calibration_entrypoint_changes_edge_floor_point_when_dist_is_nonzero. These test files are absent from git archive HEAD, but that does not prove they fail at HEAD, so strict PASS is not claimed.

honest_issues: Full tests/racketsport did not complete green; objective is PARTIAL, not PASS.
audit_storage_policy.py exits 1 due unowned cvat_upload/w6_labelpack_20260708 zip artifacts outside this lane.
No GPU dispatch was run, per hard rule. Raw GATE-1b numbers remain for the follow-on GPU lane.
The follow-on command needs a freshly refreshed explicit --remote-host because wave-6 boot says all wave-5 VMs were deleted and fleet IPs recycle.
body_postchain.py is new/uncommitted, so remote version stamping uses a working-tree hash fallback until the manager checkpoint commits the file.
next: Manager should review/commit the owned BODY knob files, then the GPU lane should provision or refresh a host and run the recorded wolverine_mixed_0200 raw command from runs/lanes/w6_gate1b_knob_20260708/report.json.
